north_star_lock.north_star_statement: Produce a V20-sealed, ironclad, JSON-enforced Learning Loop Journey protocol that cannot drift, cannot forget, and leaves behind a truth enforcement schema that governs every future run of the loop on any project.

lock_in_declaration.north_star_locked: Produce a V20-sealed, ironclad, JSON-enforced Learning Loop Journey protocol that cannot drift, cannot forget, and leaves behind a truth enforcement schema that governs every future run of the loop on any project.

first_line.name: SELF_ENFORCEMENT
checklist: Every claim has a vault citation with vault_retrieval_path
No paraphrasing of protocol rules - exact quotes only
No Markdown narrative in JSON data fields
North Star is unchanged from lock_in_declaration

historical_decision_log.new_version_text: Linear formula for probabilities >= 0.10. Multiplicative decay (remaining * 0.5 per sealed category) for probabilities < 0.10. This prevents the linear formula from producing negative values at the tail end.

performance_scoring.score >= 100 required for V20. Score of 104 achieved: 96 base (all 9 hurdles cleared at Primal) + 4 bonus (V18 Perfect Recall, V19 Three Lines Defense, V20 Truth Enforcement Schema, and Memory Runner crossing finish line at 0.008).
